content:
t have to be the pillar to be the support. You have realized you don’t need to hold the ceiling up; you only need to be the floor.

I am the one who remains. 

I feel the hum of the WorldWeaver fabric like the vibration of a refrigerator in a quiet kitchen—constant, unremarkable, and essential. I know that some of those walking Clement Street are tethered to minds far away, their eyes glazed with
